channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-07-16 23:26 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: OH MY GOSH! The House just voted 215-211 in favor of a special rules resolution, which instructs for...
item.description: OH MY GOSH! The House just voted 215-211 in favor of a special rules resolution, which instructs for the text of the SAVE America to be attached to the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA). The House is doing its job.@SpeakerJohnsonis keeping his promise.

item.title: @elonmusk: Rick Scott Is Right
item.description: Rick Scott Is Right

item.title: @elonmusk: Render mermaid charts in your CLI
item.description: Render mermaid charts in your CLI

item.title: @elonmusk: I swear, Grok Build adds about 60 points to my IQ which means I can experience what it's like to hav...
item.description: I swear, Grok Build adds about 60 points to my IQ which means I can experience what it's like to have an IQ in the top half of all humans while I'm using it.

item.title: @elonmusk: Starship Flight 13 is flying today, and once again it’s going to make history Throwback: Amazing mom...
item.description: Starship Flight 13 is flying today, and once again it’s going to make history Throwback: Amazing moment when a SpaceX employee met Elon Musk, gave him a hug, and was very optimistic about the Starship Flight “We will make it,” the employee said to Elon

item.title: @elonmusk: Stacking Starship for Flight 13
item.description: Stacking Starship for Flight 13

item.title: @elonmusk: It’s been very fast, and a pleasure to use. Nice work!
item.description: It’s been very fast, and a pleasure to use. Nice work!

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink Mobile will be available in Italy with@FASTWEB. The service will keep customers connected v...
item.description: Starlink Mobile will be available in Italy with@FASTWEB. The service will keep customers connected via apps and text messaging in remote areas without signal 🛰️📱

item.title: @elonmusk: Extremely strong at CAD and spatial reasoning
item.description: Extremely strong at CAD and spatial reasoning

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink now available in Côte d'Ivoire!
item.description: Starlink now available in Côte d'Ivoire!

item.title: @elonmusk: Love the new Starship Schematics T-shirt sold by SpaceX
item.description: Love the new Starship Schematics T-shirt sold by SpaceX

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla now in Uruguay
item.description: Tesla now in Uruguay

item.title: @elonmusk: We have Falcon and Starship taking off almost at the same time today (~2 hours apart) For other spac...
item.description: We have Falcon and Starship taking off almost at the same time today (~2 hours apart) For other space programs, this is years' worth of launch cycle, and SpaceX does it in a day

item.title: @elonmusk: Today I’m really feeling the acceleration.
item.description: Today I’m really feeling the acceleration.

item.title: @elonmusk: A lot of people asked for this, so Muse Spark 1.1 is now on OpenRouter.
item.description: A lot of people asked for this, so Muse Spark 1.1 is now on OpenRouter.

item.title: @elonmusk: No Starship, no orbital data centers. No orbital data centers, no potential $28.5 trillion market. B...
item.description: No Starship, no orbital data centers. No orbital data centers, no potential $28.5 trillion market. Before you watch tonight's launch, see what we think SpaceX's master plan is.

item.title: @elonmusk: To understand more about Starship
item.description: To understand more about Starship

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceXAI has updated Zero Data Retention (ZDR) in Docs with more information
item.description: SpaceXAI has updated Zero Data Retention (ZDR) in Docs with more information

item.title: @elonmusk: Some of the engines didn’t start, triggering an automatic launch abort. Now offloading propellant. N...
item.description: Some of the engines didn’t start, triggering an automatic launch abort. Now offloading propellant. Next launch attempt hopefully in a few days.

item.title: @elonmusk: Starship launch window opens at 5:45pm Texas time
item.description: Starship launch window opens at 5:45pm Texas time
